name: remote-cdp-browser
description: Quantum Box remote Chromium CDP browser gateway tools for Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Control the private k3s Mesh Chromium CDP gateway.
interface.longDescription: Use the Quantum Box Cloudflare Mesh remote Chromium CDP gateway with agent-browser, Playwright, Codex, or Claude Code. Provides instructions and a helper script for named and temporary browser sessions.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the remote CDP browser to open a temporary session and verify a page.
